nodes.name: Persist Opt-out

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ phone: $json.__from, opted_out_at: new Date().toISOString(), last_message_at: new Date().toISOString(), last_provider_msg_id: $json.__msgId || null }) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]
